title: Team v13 run state (UFR-022 mode unique)
description: Durable state for a single /team run. Survives crash/restart. Optimistic lock via `version` (increment on every write, reject stale). UFR-022 amendment 2026-05-18: pipeline collapsed to single 'enterprise' value, mode collapsed to 'standard' (no more selector — every run is fresh-context 5-phase enterprise).

version.description: Increment on every write. Concurrent writer rejects if version stale.

mode.description: UFR-022: mode collapsed to single value 'standard'. 'pure-doc-skip' = exemption auto when diff = 0 code files.

pipeline.description: UFR-022: single pipeline value. Pre-UFR-022 values (micro/standard/audit) removed.

currentStep.description: Phase name from the pipeline template (spec|plan|doc-cache|red|green|verify|security|review|documenter|finalize)

startCommit.description: git rev-parse HEAD captured at run init. Used by post-edit hooks to scope the diff.

storyHashes.description: Per-phase sha256 of STORY.md sections. Written by pre-complete-verify.sh; mismatch on a prior phase = history rewrite = FAIL.

agents.description: Agents dispatched and their state. UFR-022: agents are spawned per-phase fresh-context; same role may appear multiple times (e.g. architect twice for spec + plan, editor twice for red + green).

role.description: Élagage 9→6 (2026-05-31): verifier (→ gate hooks + reviewer), learning-curator (retiré), doc-fetcher+doc-curator (→ doc-cache).

phase.description: UFR-022 phase tag — distinguishes architect-spec vs architect-plan, editor-red vs editor-green. 'verify' = gate déterministe (hooks, sans agent — pas d'entrée agents[]).

model.description: opus-4.8 = tier unifié 2026-05-31 ; 4.7/4.6 conservés pour compat des runs historiques (77 runs pré-élagage).

briefSha256.description: UFR-022 brief integrity hash — agent returns BRIEF-ACK: <sha256> preamble; mismatch = BLOCK-CONTEXT-LEAK.

freshContext.description: UFR-022: true if spawned via Agent tool fresh (no continuation). Must be true for spec/plan/red/green/review.

libDocsConsulted.description: UFR-022: libs whose PATTERNS.md was read by this agent (red/green/reviewer). The verify gate (pre-phase-doc-reference-check.sh) + reviewer cross-check vs diff imports.

handoffs.description: Brief messages between agents (≤200 tokens each, enforced by post-edit-lint.sh)

gates.description: Quality-gate verdicts emitted during the run

telemetry.description: Aggregate metrics for this run (mirrors what Langfuse stores)

estimatedCostUSD.description: Pre-run forecast in USD. KR1 gate refuses dispatch if missing.

correctiveLoops.description: DEPRECATED — kept for backwards compat. Use intraPhaseHookLoops + reviewerRejectionLoops.

intraPhaseHookLoops.description: UFR-022: cap = 2. Counts post-edit-lint/tsc/test fails within the same phase (editor red or green). Beyond cap = STOP + escalate.

reviewerRejectionLoops.description: UFR-022: ILLIMITED (zero cap, zero warning surface). Counts CHANGES_REQUESTED verdicts that re-spawn a fresh phase. Telemetry only.

phaseSpawns.description: UFR-022: number of fresh spawns per phase tag. e.g. {spec: 1, plan: 1, red: 3, green: 2, review: 4} when reviewer rejects bounce work back. No cap on any value.
